what_it_does: Defines an HTML page for the ConceptV Platform UI kit, linking shared and platform CSS, creating a React mount node, loading React/ReactDOM/Babel from CDNs, and loading local JSX components and screens in sequence.
observations: Includes a dsCard metadata comment naming the UI kit dashboard and its Gallery, Calendar, Brand Kit, and Hub Settings areas.
Uses a single div with id="app" as the application mount point.
Loads React 18.3.1, ReactDOM 18.3.1, and Babel standalone 7.29.0 from unpkg with integrity attributes and anonymous CORS.
Loads local JSX files with type="text/babel" in an explicit order, ending with PlatformApp.jsx.
standouts: Browser-side JSX transpilation is part of the page setup.
The file acts as an assembly shell for multiple platform dashboard screens.
The dsCard comment carries design-system catalog metadata directly in the HTML.
conventions: Uses a standard HTML5 document structure with UTF-8 metadata.
Keeps styling links in the head and script loading at the end of the body.
Uses UMD CDN builds for React tooling.
Orders local component and screen scripts before the app entry script.
concerns: Runtime dependency on external CDN scripts means the page is not self-contained.
React development builds and Babel standalone indicate a prototype or handoff-oriented runtime rather than a production bundle.
notes: This is the browser scaffold for the Platform UI kit dashboard, wiring styles, runtime libraries, and local JSX screens into one page.
questions: Which screen is intended to be shown first?
Is browser-side Babel intended for the delivered artifact or only for handoff preview?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the file: it is a UI Kit Platform dashboard shell that loads dashboard-related components and screens.
intention_signals: It appears intended to make the platform dashboard UI kit directly previewable in a browser by composing shared styles, runtime React tooling, and local JSX modules.
novelty: The embedded @dsCard catalog metadata and direct text/babel component loading are the distinct file-local traits.
contribution: Provides the HTML preview shell, design-card metadata, mount point, stylesheet wiring, CDN runtime setup, and ordered component loading needed to preserve this platform UI kit as a runnable substrate.
summary_for_embedding: HTML scaffold for the ConceptV Platform UI kit dashboard that links CSS, creates a React mount point, loads CDN React/Babel tooling, and includes local JSX components and screens.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for previewing and cataloging the creator-side platform dashboard UI kit in a handoff-oriented browser page.
